---
title: "Biorplot Documentation"
author: "Zheng Hu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography:
- book.bib
- packages.bib
description: |
  This is a minimal example of using the bookdown package to write a book.
  set in the _output.yml file.
  The HTML output format for this example is bookdown::gitbook,
link-citations: yes
github-repo: rstudio/bookdown-demo
---


# Installation & Usage

You can download the package from [Biorplot GitHub Page](https://github.com/zhenghu159/Biorplot):\
```{r,eval = FALSE}
git clone https://github.com/zhenghu159/Biorplot.git
```
Then load the package by:\
```{r,eval = FALSE}
source('Biorplot.R')
```

## Dependence

You should install these dependence:\
[scales](https://github.com/r-lib/scales), [ggsci](https://github.com/nanxstats/ggsci), 
[ggthemes](https://github.com/jrnold/ggthemes), [ggplot2](https://github.com/tidyverse/ggplot2), 
[cowplot](https://github.com/wilkelab/cowplot), [ggrepel](https://github.com/slowkow/ggrepel)
```{r,eval = FALSE}
install.packages(c("scales","ggsci","ggthemes","ggplot2","cowplot","ggrepel"))
```

## example

**Basic Plot**\

<table width="1000">
    <tr>
        <td width="200"><justify>
        <a href=https://zhenghu159.github.io/Biorplot/basic-plot.html#bior_sankey target="-blank" title="Bior_Sankey">
        <img src="images/Bior_Sankey.png" > 
        </a>
        </justify></td>
        
        <td width="200"><justify>
        <a href=https://zhenghu159.github.io/Biorplot/basic-plot.html#bior_pie target="-blank" title="Bior_pie">
        <img src="images/Bior_pie.png" >
        </a>
        </justify></td>
        
        <td width="200"> <justify>
        <a href=https://zhenghu159.github.io/Biorplot/basic-plot.html#bior_stackbarplot target="-blank" title="Bior_StackBarplot">
        <img src="images/Bior_StackBarplot.png" >
        </a>
        <justify></td>
        
        <td width="200"> </td>
        <td width="200"> </td>
    </tr>
</table>

**scRNAseq Plot**\

<table>
    <tr>
        <td width="200"><justify>
        <a href=https://zhenghu159.github.io/Biorplot/scrnaseq-plot.html#bior_dimplot target="-blank" title="Bior_DimPlot">
        <img src="images/Bior_DimPlot.png" > 
        </a>
        </justify></td>
        
        <td width="200"><justify>
        <a href=https://zhenghu159.github.io/Biorplot/scrnaseq-plot.html#bior_featurevlnplot target="-blank" title="Bior_FeatureVlnplot">
        <img src="images/Bior_FeatureVlnplot.png" >
        </a>
        </justify></td>
        
        <td width="200"><justify>
        <a href=https://zhenghu159.github.io/Biorplot/scrnaseq-plot.html#bior_doheatmap target="-blank" title="Bior_DoHeatmap">
        <img src="images/Bior_DoHeatmap.png" >
        </a>
        <justify></td>
        
        <td width="200"> </td>
        <td width="200"> </td>
    </tr>
</table>

**NGS Plot**\

<table>
    <tr>
        <td width="200"><justify>
        <a href=https://zhenghu159.github.io/Biorplot/ngs-plot.html#bior_volcano target="-blank" title="Bior_Volcano">
        <img src="images/Bior_Volcano.png" > 
        </a>
        </justify></td>
        
        <td width="200"> </td>
        <td width="200"> </td>
        <td width="200"> </td>
        <td width="200"> </td>
    </tr>   
</table>
